nasb.text: Yet the number of the sons of Israel Will be like the sand of the sea, Which cannot be measured or numbered; And in the place Where it is said to them, “You are not My people,” It will be said to them, “You are the sons of the living God.”

esv.text: Yet the number of the children of Israel shall be like the sand of the sea, which cannot be measured or numbered. And in the place where it was said to them, “You are not my people,” it shall be said to them, “Children of the living God.”

cnv.text: “然而，以色列人的數目， 必多如海邊的沙， 量不盡，數不完。 從前在甚麼地方對他們說： ‘你們不是我的子民’， 將來要在那裡對他們說： ‘你們是永活的　神的兒子。’

ccb.text: “然而，以色列的人数必像海沙一样量不尽、数不完。从前我在什么地方对他们说‘你们不是我的子民’，将来也要在那里对他们说‘你们是永活上帝的儿女’。
